pairs.question: What is the Welsh title of the television series set in a comprehensive school, and what does it translate to in English?
pairs.answer: The Welsh title of the series is "Gwaith/Cartref," which translates to "Home/Work" in English.

pairs.question: In which Welsh valleys were the first five series of Gwaith/Cartref set, and where was the setting changed for series six onwards?
pairs.answer: The first five series were set in the Rhondda Cynon Taf valley. Starting with series six, the setting moved to the Rhymney Valley.

pairs.question: How many episodes did Gwaith/Cartref air, and over what period of time?
pairs.answer: Gwaith/Cartref aired for a total of 90 episodes over nearly 7 years, from 18 September 2011 to 12 April 2018.

pairs.question: When and where were the first three series of Gwaith/Cartref made available for streaming?
pairs.answer: The first three series were made available on S4C Clic in 2019.

pairs.question: What are the two main focus areas of each episode in Gwaith/Cartref, and how is this structured?
pairs.answer: Each episode is divided into two halves: the first half focuses on the professional lives (work-side) of the teachers, while the second half centers on their personal lives (home-side).

pairs.question: Which actor won a BAFTA Cymru Best Actress award for her role in Gwaith/Cartref, and in which series?
pairs.answer: Actress Rhian Blythe won the BAFTA Cymru Best Actress award for her role in the 2014 series of Gwaith/Cartref.

pairs.question: Write a Python script to calculate the total duration (in days) Gwaith/Cartref was broadcast, given its start and end dates.
pairs.answer:
python
from datetime import datetime

# Define the start and end dates
start_date = datetime(2011, 9, 18)
end_date = datetime(2018, 4, 12)

# Calculate the duration in days
duration_days = (end_date - start_date).days
print(f"Gwaith/Cartref was broadcast for {duration_days} days.")
